info.title: Mandal Backend API
info.description: Complete API documentation for the Mandal backend project, covering authentication, mandal management, member management, contributions, and loans.

post.summary: Check if a mobile number is registered

404.description: User not found (if purpose is login or forgot-password)

post.summary: Send SMS OTP to mobile number

400.description: Invalid OTP or too many attempts

post.summary: Set user password post OTP verification
Log out user, revoking refresh token session
Add a member to a mandal

delete.summary: Remove a member from a mandal

post.summary: Pay a contribution for a mandal
Request a loan for a mandal
